title: hernandiaceae
intro: The taxonomical rank of Hernandiaceae is a family of plants. It is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. Hernandiaceae includes approximately 90 species of evergreen trees and shrubs, characterized by their unique and often showy flowers. The family is known for its diverse range of species, many of which are highly valued for their medicinal and ornamental properties.
